info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

200.description: Successful response, return user notification list.

x-codeSamples.source:
import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/notifications?notifyStates=SOME_STRING_VALUE&cursor=SOME_STRING_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"isRead\":true}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PATCH", "/api/notifications/%7BnotificationId%7D/status", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("PATCH", "/api/notifications/read-all", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

200.description: Successful response, return user notification unread count.

x-codeSamples.source:
import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/notifications/unread-count", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
